title: IMX Task Packet
description: Formal routing contract for a unit of work dispatched through IMX. The canonical file is ~/.imx/catalog/schemas/task_packet.schema.json.

task_id.description: Unique stable identifier for this task. Should include idempotency key when applicable.

risk_tier.description: Highest applicable risk tier for this task. Gates execution regardless of capability.

relationship.description: Relationship of this task to the originating request.

instructions.description: Inline instruction payload. Use instructions_ref instead for long or file-backed tasks.

instructions_ref.description: Path or URI to instruction file. Prefer this for tasks that reference repo files or shared prompts.

gate_mode.description: soft = warn and prefer cheaper route; hard = deny when exhausted.

capability_profile.description: Profile ID from ~/.imx/catalog/profiles/*.yaml. Governs allowed tools, risk tiers, and guardrails.

node_id.description: Resolved node identifier (engine × harness × profile). Written by the router at dispatch time.

memory_refs.description: gitmem procedure paths, route card refs, or other durable memory injected into context.

context_refs.description: Runtime context sources: summaries, transcripts, briefings, onboarding units.

untrusted_sources.description: Classes of untrusted input present in this task's context.

chain_depth.description: Agent-to-agent hop count since the original human request.
